message:
fix(sync): set GIT_DIR and GIT_WORK_TREE in GitCmd for worktree support

When bd sync runs from a git worktree, git commands inherit environment
variables pointing to the worktree .git instead of the main repo.
This causes pathspec outside repository errors.

Fix by explicitly setting GIT_DIR and GIT_WORK_TREE in GitCmd to ensure
git operates on the correct repository (the one containing .beads/).

Closes #1312
